      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "suspend fun patchConnections(snapshot: ConnectionsSnapshot) {\n        lastSnapshot = snapshot\n        val sorted = snapshot.connections.sortedBy { it.start }.let { list -\u003e\n            if (sortNewestFirst) list.asReversed() else list\n        }\n        val nowMs = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        val intervalSec = if (previousTimeMs \u003e 0) (nowMs - previousTimeMs) / 1000.0 else 1.0\n        val intervalSecClamped = if (intervalSec \u003c 0.5) 1.0 else intervalSec\n\n        val displayItems = sorted.map { conn -\u003e\n            val prev = previousTraffic[conn.id]\n            val downloadSpeedBps = if (prev != null) {\n                ((conn.download - prev.second) / intervalSecClamped).toLong().coerceAtLeast(0)\n            } else 0L\n            val trafficLine = \"↓ ${conn.download.toBytesString()} (${downloadSpeedBps.toSpeedString()})\"\n            val startTimeText = conn.start.formatConnectionStartTime()\n            ConnectionDisplayItem(conn, trafficLine, startTimeText)\n        }\n\n        previousTraffic = snapshot.connections.associate { it.id to (it.upload to it.download) }\n        previousTimeMs = nowMs\n\n        withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {\n            adapter.patchDataSet(adapter::displayItems, displayItems, detectMove = true) { it.connection.id }\n        }\n    }\n\n    init {\n        binding.self = this\n        binding.activityBarLayout.applyFrom(context)\n        binding.recyclerList.applyLinearAdapter(context, adapter)\n        binding.sortOrderView.setOnClickListener { toggleSortOrder() }\n    }\n\n    private fun toggleSortOrder() {\n        sortNewestFirst = !sortNewestFirst\n        lastSnapshot?.let { snapshot -\u003e launch { patchConnections(snapshot) } }\n    }\n}",

        "contents": "const ORDER_OPTIONS = [\n  {\n    id: \"default\",\n    labelKey: \"connections.components.order.default\",\n    fn: (list: IConnectionsItem[]) =\u003e\n      list.sort(\n        (a, b) =\u003e\n          new Date(b.start || \"0\").getTime()! -\n          new Date(a.start || \"0\").getTime()!,\n      ),\n  },\n  {\n    id: \"uploadSpeed\",\n    labelKey: \"connections.components.order.uploadSpeed\",\n    fn: (list: IConnectionsItem[]) =\u003e\n      list.sort((a, b) =\u003e b.curUpload! - a.curUpload!),\n  },\n  {\n    id: \"downloadSpeed\",\n    labelKey: \"connections.components.order.downloadSpeed\",\n    fn: (list: IConnectionsItem[]) =\u003e\n      list.sort((a, b) =\u003e b.curDownload! - a.curDownload!),\n  },\n] as const;\n\ntype OrderKey = (typeof ORDER_OPTIONS)[number][\"id\"];\n\nconst orderFunctionMap = ORDER_OPTIONS.reduce\u003cRecord\u003cOrderKey, OrderFunc\u003e\u003e\n;",

        "contents": "const ConnectionsPage = \n (\n          \u003cBaseStyledSelect\n            value={curOrderOpt}\n            onChange={(e) =\u003e setCurOrderOpt(e.target.value as OrderKey)}\n          \u003e\n            {ORDER_OPTIONS.map((option) =\u003e (\n              \u003cMenuItem key={option.id} value={option.id}\u003e\n                \u003cspan style={{ fontSize: 14 }}\u003e{t(option.labelKey)}\u003c/span\u003e\n              \u003c/MenuItem\u003e\n            ))}\n          \u003c/BaseStyledSelect\u003e\n        )}\n        \u003cBox\n          sx={{\n            flex: 1,\n            display: \"flex\",\n            alignItems: \"center\",\n            \"\u0026 \u003e *\": {\n              flex: 1,\n            },\n          }}\n        \u003e\n          \u003cBaseSearchBox onSearch={handleSearch} /\u003e\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n\n      {!hasTableData ? (\n        \u003cBaseEmpty /\u003e\n      ) : isTableLayout ? (\n        \u003cConnectionTable\n          connections={filterConn}\n          onShowDetail={(detail) =\u003e\n            detailRef.current?.open(detail, connectionsType === \"closed\")\n          }\n          columnManagerOpen={isTableLayout \u0026\u0026 isColumnManagerOpen}\n          onOpenColumnManager={() =\u003e setIsColumnManagerOpen(true)}\n          onCloseColumnManager={() =\u003e setIsColumnManagerOpen(false)}\n        /\u003e\n      ) : (\n        \u003cVirtuoso\n          style={{\n            flex: 1,\n            borderRadius: \"8px\",\n            WebkitOverflowScrolling: \"touch\",\n            overscrollBehavior: \"contain\",\n          }}\n          data={filterConn}\n          itemContent={(_, item) =\u003e (\n            \u003cConnectionItem\n              value={item}\n              closed={connectionsType === \"closed\"}\n              onShowDetail={() =\u003e\n                detailRef.current?.open(item, connectionsType === \"closed\")\n              }\n            /\u003e\n          )}\n        /\u003e\n      )}\n      \u003cConnectionDetail ref={detailRef} /\u003e\n      \u003cZoom\n        in={connectionsType === \"closed\" \u0026\u0026 filterConn.length \u003e 0}\n        unmountOnExit\n      \u003e\n        \u003cFab\n          size=\"medium\"\n;",

        "contents": "import {\n  closestCenter,\n  DndContext,\n  PointerSensor,\n  useSensor,\n  useSensors,\n  type DragEndEvent,\n} from \"@dnd-kit/core\";\nimport { arrayMove, SortableContext, useSortable } from \"@dnd-kit/sortable\";\nimport { CSS } from \"@dnd-kit/utilities\";\nimport { DragIndicatorRounded } from \"@mui/icons-material\";\nimport {\n  Button,\n  Checkbox,\n  Dialog,\n  DialogActions,\n  DialogContent,\n  DialogTitle,\n  IconButton,\n  List,\n  ListItem,\n  ListItemText,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport type { Column } from \"@tanstack/react-table\";\nimport { useCallback, useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\n\ninterface Props {\n  open: boolean;\n  columns: Column\u003cIConnectionsItem, unknown\u003e[];\n  onClose: () =\u003e void;\n  onOrderChange: (order: string[]) =\u003e void;\n  onReset: () =\u003e void;\n}\n\nexport const ConnectionColumnManager = ({\n  open,\n  columns,\n  onClose,\n  onOrderChange,\n  onReset,\n}: Props)\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const orderFunctionMap = ORDER_OPTIONS.reduce\u003cRecord\u003cOrderKey, OrderFunc\u003e\u003e(\n  (acc, option) =\u003e {\n    acc[option.id] = option.fn;\n    return acc;\n  },\n  {} as Record\u003cOrderKey, OrderFunc\u003e,\n);\n\nconst ConnectionsPage = () =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const [match, setMatch] = useState\u003c(input: string) =\u003e boolean\u003e(\n    () =\u003e () =\u003e true,\n  );\n  const [curOrderOpt, setCurOrderOpt] = useState\u003cOrderKey\u003e(\"default\");\n  const [connectionsType, setConnectionsType] = useState\u003c\"active\" | \"closed\"\u003e(\n    \"active\",\n  );\n\n  const {\n    response: { data: connections },\n    clearClosedConnections,\n  } = useConnectionData();\n\n  const [setting, setSetting] = useConnectionSetting();\n\n  const isTableLayout = setting.layout === \"table\";\n\n  const [isColumnManagerOpen, setIsColumnManagerOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const [filterConn] = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    const orderFunc = orderFunctionMap[curOrderOpt];\n    const conns =\n      (connectionsType === \"active\"\n        ? connections?.activeConnections\n        : connections?.closedConnections) ??         "contents": "const SortableColumnItem = ({\n  column,\n  label,\n  dragHandleLabel,\n  disableToggle = false,\n}: SortableColumnItemProps) =\u003e {\n  const {\n    attributes,\n    listeners,\n    setNodeRef,\n    transform,\n    transition,\n    isDragging,\n  } = useSortable({ id: column.id });\n\n  const style = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),\n      transition,\n    }),\n    [transform, transition],\n  );\n\n  return (\n    \u003cListItem\n      ref={setNodeRef}\n      disableGutters\n      sx={{\n        px: 1,\n        py: 0.5,\n        borderRadius: 1,\n        border: (theme) =\u003e &#96;1px solid ${theme.palette.divider}&#96;,\n        backgroundColor: isDragging ? \"action.hover\" : \"transparent\",\n        display: \"flex\",\n        alignItems: \"center\",\n        gap: 1,\n      }}\n      style={style}\n    \u003e\n      \u003cCheckbox\n        edge=\"start\"\n        checked={column.getIsVisible()}\n        disabled={disableToggle}\n        onChange={(event) =\u003e column.toggleVisibility(event.target.checked)}\n      /\u003e\n      \u003cListItemText\n        primary={label}\n        slotProps={{ primary: { variant: \"body2\" } }}\n        sx={{ mr: 1 }}\n      /\u003e\n      \u003cIconButton\n        edge=\"end\"\n        size=\"small\"\n        sx={{ cursor: isDragging ? \"grabbing\" : \"grab\" }}\n        aria-label={dragHandleLabel}\n        {...attributes}\n        {...listeners}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cDragIndicatorRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n    \u003c/ListItem\u003e\n  );\n};\n\nconst getColumnLabel = (column: Column\u003cIConnectionsItem, unknown\u003e) =\u003e\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyHead = \n\n [groupName, testUrl, url]);\n\n  return (\n    \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 0.5, ...sx }}\u003e\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.locate\")}\n        onClick={onLocation}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cMyLocationRounded /\u003e\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.delayCheck\")}\n        onClick={() =\u003e {\n          debugLog(&#96;[ProxyHead] 点击延迟测试按钮，组: ${groupName}&#96;);\n          // Remind the user that it is custom test url\n          if (testUrl?.trim() \u0026\u0026 textState !== \"filter\") {\n            debugLog(&#96;[ProxyHead] 使用自定义测试URL: ${testUrl}&#96;);\n            onHeadState({ textState: \"url\" });\n          }\n          onCheckDelay();\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cNetworkCheckRounded /\u003e\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={\n          [\n            t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortDefault\"),\n            t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortDelay\"),\n            t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortName\"),\n          ][sortType]\n        }\n        onClick={() =\u003e\n          onHeadState({ sortType: ((sortType + 1) % 3) as ProxySortType })\n        }\n      \u003e\n        {sortType !== 1 \u0026\u0026 sortType !== 2 \u0026\u0026 \u003cSortRounded /\u003e}\n        {sortType === 1 \u0026\u0026 \u003cAccessTimeRounded /\u003e}\n        {sortType === 2 \u0026\u0026 \u003cSortByAlphaRounded /\u003e}\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n        title={t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.delayCheckUrl\")}\n        onClick={() =\u003e\n          onHeadState({ textState: textState === \"url\" ? null : \"url\" })\n        }\n      \u003e\n        {textState === \"url\" ? (\n          \u003cWifiTetheringRounded /\u003e\n        ) : (\n          \u003cWifiTetheringOffRounded /\u003e\n        )}\n      \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n\n      \u003cIconButton\n        size=\"small\"\n        color=\"inherit\"\n;",

        "contents": "export const ConnectionColumnManager = ({\n  open,\n  columns,\n  onClose,\n  onOrderChange,\n  onReset,\n}: Props) =\u003e {\n  const sensors = useSensors(\n    useSensor(PointerSensor, {\n      activationConstraint: { distance: 6 },\n    }),\n  );\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n\n  const items = useMemo(() =\u003e columns.map((column) =\u003e column.id), [columns]);\n  const visibleCount = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e columns.filter((column) =\u003e column.getIsVisible()).length,\n    [columns],\n  );\n\n  const handleDragEnd = useCallback(\n    (event: DragEndEvent) =\u003e {\n      const { active, over } = event;\n      if (!over || active.id === over.id) return;\n\n      const order = columns.map((column) =\u003e column.id);\n      const oldIndex = order.indexOf(active.id as string);\n      const newIndex = order.indexOf(over.id as string);\n      if (oldIndex === -1 || newIndex === -1) return;\n\n      onOrderChange(arrayMove(order, oldIndex, newIndex));\n    },\n    [columns, onOrderChange],\n  );\n\n  return\n;",

        "contents": "export const ConnectionTable = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const {\n    connections,\n    onShowDetail,\n    columnManagerOpen,\n    onOpenColumnManager,\n    onCloseColumnManager,\n  } = props;\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const [columnWidths, setColumnWidths] = useLocalStorage\u003cColumnSizingState\u003e(\n    \"connection-table-widths\",\n    // server-side value, this is the default value used by server-side rendering (if any)\n    // Do not omit (otherwise a Suspense boundary will be triggered)\n    {},\n  );\n\n  const [columnVisibilityModel, setColumnVisibilityModel] =\n    useLocalStorage\u003cVisibilityState\u003e(\n      \"connection-table-visibility\",\n      {},\n      {\n        serializer: JSON.stringify,\n        deserializer: (value) =\u003e {\n          try {\n            const parsed = JSON.parse(value);\n            if (parsed \u0026\u0026 typeof parsed === \"object\") return parsed;\n          } catch (err) {\n            console.warn(\"Failed to parse connection-table-visibility\", err);\n          }\n          return {};\n        },\n      },\n    );\n\n  const [columnOrder, setColumnOrder] = useLocalStorage\u003cstring[]\u003e(\n    \"connection-table-order\",\n    [],\n    {\n      serializer: JSON.stringify,\n      deserializer: (value) =\u003e {\n        try {\n          const parsed = JSON.parse(value);\n          if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return parsed;\n        } catch (err) {\n          console.warn(\"Failed to parse connection-table-order\", err);\n        }\n        return [];\n      },\n    },\n  );\n\n  interface BaseColumn {\n    field: ColumnField;\n    headerName: string;\n    width?: number;\n    minWidth?: number;\n    align?: \"left\" | \"right\";\n    cell?: (row: IConnectionsItem) =\u003e ReactNode;\n  }\n\n  const baseColumns = useMemo\u003cBaseColumn[]\u003e\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const ConnectionColumnManager = \nconst handleDragEnd = \n\n    [columns, onOrderChange],\n  );\n\n  return (\n    \u003cDialog open={open} onClose={onClose} maxWidth=\"xs\" fullWidth\u003e\n      \u003cDialogTitle\u003e\n        {t(\"connections.components.columnManager.title\")}\n      \u003c/DialogTitle\u003e\n      \u003cDialogContent sx={{ pt: 1 }}\u003e\n        \u003cDndContext\n          sensors={sensors}\n          collisionDetection={closestCenter}\n          onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}\n        \u003e\n          \u003cSortableContext items={items}\u003e\n            \u003cList\n              dense\n              disablePadding\n              sx={{ display: \"flex\", flexDirection: \"column\", gap: 1 }}\n            \u003e\n              {columns.map((column) =\u003e (\n                \u003cSortableColumnItem\n                  key={column.id}\n                  column={column}\n                  label={getColumnLabel(column)}\n                  dragHandleLabel={t(\n                    \"connections.components.columnManager.dragHandle\",\n                  )}\n                  disableToggle={\n                    !column.getCanHide() ||\n                    (column.getIsVisible() \u0026\u0026 visibleCount \u003c= 1)\n                  }\n                /\u003e\n              ))}\n            \u003c/List\u003e\n          \u003c/SortableContext\u003e\n        \u003c/DndContext\u003e\n      \u003c/DialogContent\u003e\n      \u003cDialogActions sx={{ px: 3, pb: 2 }}\u003e\n        \u003cButton variant=\"text\" onClick={onReset}\u003e\n          {t(\"shared.actions.resetToDefault\")}\n        \u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003cButton variant=\"contained\" onClick={onClose}\u003e\n          {t(\"shared.actions.close\")}\n        \u003c/Button\u003e\n      \u003c/DialogActions\u003e\n    \u003c/Dialog\u003e\n  );\n};\n\ninterface SortableColumnItemProps {\n  column: Column\u003cIConnectionsItem, unknown\u003e\n;\n}",

        "contents": "import { Box, IconButton, Tooltip } from \"@mui/material\";\nimport type { Column } from \"@tanstack/react-table\";\nimport {\n  ColumnDef,\n  ColumnOrderState,\n  ColumnSizingState,\n  flexRender,\n  getCoreRowModel,\n  getSortedRowModel,\n  SortingState,\n  Updater,\n  useReactTable,\n  VisibilityState,\n} from \"@tanstack/react-table\";\nimport { useVirtualizer } from \"@tanstack/react-virtual\";\nimport dayjs from \"dayjs\";\nimport { useLocalStorage } from \"foxact/use-local-storage\";\nimport {\n  useCallback,\n  useEffect,\n  useMemo,\n  useRef,\n  useState,\n  type ReactNode,\n} from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\n\nimport parseTraffic from \"@/utils/parse-traffic\";\nimport { truncateStr } from \"@/utils/truncate-str\";\n\nimport { ConnectionColumnManager } from \"./connection-column-manager\";\nimport { ProcessIcon } from \"./process-icon\";\n\nconst ROW_HEIGHT = 40;\n\n/**\n * Reconcile stored column order with base columns to handle added/removed fields\n */\nconst reconcileColumnOrder = (\n  storedOrder: string[],\n  baseFields: string[],\n): string[] =\u003e {\n  const filtered = storedOrder.filter((field) =\u003e baseFields.includes(field));\n  const missing = baseFields.filter((field) =\u003e !filtered.includes(field));\n  return [...filtered, ...missing];\n};\n\ntype ColumnField =\n  | \"host\"\n  | \"download\"\n  | \"upload\"\n  | \"dlSpeed\"\n  | \"ulSpeed\"\n  | \"chains\"\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst writeProfileScopedItem = \n(baseKey: string, value: string) =\u003e {\n\n    },\n    [getProfileStorageKey],\n  );\n\n  // 统一代理选择器\n  const { handleSelectChange } = useProxySelection({\n    onSuccess: () =\u003e {\n      refreshProxy();\n    },\n    onError: (error) =\u003e {\n      console.error(\"代理切换失败\", error);\n      refreshProxy();\n    },\n  });\n\n  // 判断模式\n  const mode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";\n  const isGlobalMode = mode === \"global\";\n  const isDirectMode = mode === \"direct\";\n\n  // Sorting type state\n  const [sortType, setSortType] = useState\u003cProxySortType\u003e(() =\u003e {\n    const savedSortType = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE);\n    return savedSortType ? (Number(savedSortType) as ProxySortType) : 0;\n  });\n  const [delaySortRefresh, setDelaySortRefresh] = useState(0);\n\n  const normalizePolicyName = useCallback(\n    (value?: string | null) =\u003e (typeof value === \"string\" ? value.trim() : \"\"),\n    [],\n  );\n\n  const matchPolicyName = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!Array.isArray(rules)) return \"\";\n    for (let index = rules.length - 1; index \u003e= 0; index -= 1) {\n      const rule = rules[index];\n      if (!rule) continue;\n\n      if (\n        typeof rule?.type === \"string\" \u0026\u0026\n        rule.type.toUpperCase() === \"MATCH\"\n      ) {\n        const policy = normalizePolicyName(rule.proxy);\n        if (policy) {\n          return policy;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    return \"\";\n  }, [rules, normalizePolicyName]);\n\n  type ProxyGroupOption = {\n    name: string;\n    now: string;\n    all: string[];\n    type?: string;\n  };\n\n  type ProxyState = {\n    proxyData: {\n      groups: ProxyGroupOption[];\n;\n;",
        "detailedLines": [

          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "  const { handleSelectChange } = useProxySelection({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    onSuccess: () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "      refreshProxy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    onError: (error) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "      console.error(\"代理切换失败\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "      refreshProxy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "  // 判断模式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "  const mode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "  const isGlobalMode = mode === \"global\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "  const isDirectMode = mode === \"direct\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "  // Sorting type state"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "  const [sortType, setSortType] = useState\u003cProxySortType\u003e(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "    const savedSortType = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY_SORT_TYPE);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "    return savedSortType ? (Number(savedSortType) as ProxySortType) : 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "  const [delaySortRefresh, setDelaySortRefresh] = useState(0);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "  const normalizePolicyName = useCallback("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "    (value?: string | null) =\u003e (typeof value === \"string\" ? value.trim() : \"\"),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "    [],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "  const matchPolicyName = useMemo(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "    if (!Array.isArray(rules)) return \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "    for (let index = rules.length - 1; index \u003e= 0; index -= 1) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "      const rule = rules[index];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "      if (!rule) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "      if ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "        typeof rule?.type === \"string\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "        rule.type.toUpperCase() === \"MATCH\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "      ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "        const policy = normalizePolicyName(rule.proxy);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "        if (policy) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "          return policy;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "    return \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "  }, [rules, normalizePolicyName]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "  type ProxyGroupOption = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "    name: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    now: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "    all: string[];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "    type?: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "  type ProxyState = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "    proxyData: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "      groups: ProxyGroupOption[];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1104,
            "text": ";"
          }
        ],

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ConnectionTable = \n\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cBox\n        sx={{\n          display: \"flex\",\n          flexDirection: \"column\",\n          flex: 1,\n          minHeight: 0,\n          position: \"relative\",\n          fontFamily: (theme) =\u003e theme.typography.fontFamily,\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cTooltip title={t(\"connections.components.columnManager.title\")}\u003e\n          \u003cIconButton\n            size=\"small\"\n            onClick={onOpenColumnManager}\n            sx={{\n              position: \"absolute\",\n              top: 4,\n              right: 4,\n              zIndex: 3,\n              backgroundColor: (theme) =\u003e\n                theme.palette.mode === \"dark\"\n                  ? theme.palette.background.default\n                  : theme.palette.background.paper,\n              \"\u0026:hover\": {\n                backgroundColor: (theme) =\u003e theme.palette.action.hover,\n              },\n            }}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cViewColumnRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e\n          \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n        \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n        \u003cBox\n          ref={tableContainerRef}\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \n\n\n  return (\n    \u003cEnhancedCard\n      title={t(\"home.components.currentProxy.title\")}\n      icon={\n        \u003cTooltip\n          title={\n            currentProxy\n              ? &#96;${signalInfo.text}: ${delayManager.formatDelay(currentDelay)}&#96;\n              : \"无代理节点\"\n          }\n        \u003e\n          \u003cBox sx={{ color: signalInfo.color }}\u003e\n            {currentProxy ? signalInfo.icon : \u003cSignalNone color=\"disabled\" /\u003e}\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n        \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n      }\n      iconColor={currentProxy ? \"primary\" : undefined}\n      action={\n        \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 1 }}\u003e\n          \u003cTooltip\n            title={t(\"home.components.currentProxy.actions.refreshDelay\")}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cspan\u003e\n              \u003cIconButton\n                size=\"small\"\n                color=\"inherit\"\n                onClick={handleCheckDelay}\n                disabled={isDirectMode}\n              \u003e\n                \u003cNetworkCheckRounded /\u003e\n              \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n            \u003c/span\u003e\n          \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n          \u003cTooltip title={getSortTooltip()}\u003e\n            \u003cIconButton\n              size=\"small\"\n              color=\"inherit\"\n              onClick={handleSortTypeChange}\n            \u003e\n              {getSortIcon()}\n            \u003c/IconButton\u003e\n          \u003c/Tooltip\u003e\n          \u003cButton\n            variant=\"outlined\"\n            size=\"small\"\n            onClick={goToProxies}\n            sx={{ borderRadius: 1.5 }}\n            endIcon={\u003cChevronRight fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e}\n          \u003e\n            {t(\"layout.components.navigation.tabs.proxies\")}\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003c/Box\u003e\n      }\n    \u003e\n      {currentProxy ? (\n        \u003cBox\u003e\n          {/* 代理节点信息显示 */}\n;",

        "contents": "const ConnectionsPage = \n,\n      }}\n      header={\n        \u003cBox sx={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: 2 }}\u003e\n          \u003cBox sx={{ mx: 1 }}\u003e\n            {t(\"shared.labels.downloaded\")}:{\" \"}\n            {parseTraffic(connections?.downloadTotal)}\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n          \u003cBox sx={{ mx: 1 }}\u003e\n            {t(\"shared.labels.uploaded\")}:{\" \"}\n            {parseTraffic(connections?.uploadTotal)}\n          \u003c/Box\u003e\n          \u003cIconButton\n            color=\"inherit\"\n            size=\"small\"\n            onClick={() =\u003e\n              setSetting((o) =\u003e\n                o?.layout !== \"table\"\n                  ? { ...o, layout: \"table\" }\n                  : { ...o, layout: \"list\" },\n              )\n            }\n          \u003e\n            {isTableLayout ?       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function useFilterSort(\n  proxies: IProxyItem[],\n  groupName: string,\n  filterText: string,\n  sortType: ProxySortType,\n  searchState?: ProxySearchState,\n  groupTimeout?: number,\n) {\n  const [_, bumpRefresh] = useReducer((count: number) =\u003e count + 1, 0);\n  const lastInputRef = useRef\u003c{ text: string; sort: ProxySortType } | null\u003e(\n    null,\n  );\n  const debounceTimerRef = useRef\u003cnumber | null\u003e(null);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let last = 0;\n\n    delayManager.setGroupListener(groupName, () =\u003e {\n      // 简单节流\n      const now = Date.now();\n      if (now - last \u003e 666) {\n        last = now;\n        bumpRefresh();\n      }\n    });\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      delayManager.removeGroupListener(groupName);\n    };\n  }, [groupName]);\n\n  const compute = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    const fp = filterProxies(proxies, groupName, filterText, searchState);\n    const sp = sortProxies(\n      fp,\n      groupName,\n      sortType,\n      groupTimeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS,\n    );\n    return sp;\n  }, [\n    proxies,\n    groupName,\n    filterText,\n    sortType,\n    searchState,\n    groupTimeout,\n  ]);\n\n  const [result, setResult] = useReducer(\n    (_prev: IProxyItem[], next: IProxyItem[]) =\u003e next,\n    compute,\n  );\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (debounceTimerRef.current !== null) {\n      window.clearTimeout(debounceTimerRef.current);\n      debounceTimerRef.current = null;\n    }\n\n    const prev = lastInputRef.current;\n    const stableInputs =\n      prev \u0026\u0026 prev.text === filterText \u0026\u0026 prev.sort === sortType;\n\n    lastInputRef.current = { text: filterText, sort: sortType };\n\n    const delay = stableInputs ? 0 : 150;\n    debounceTimerRef.current = window.setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n      setResult(compute);\n      debounceTimerRef.current = null;\n    }, delay);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (debounceTimerRef.current !== null) {\n        window.clearTimeout(debounceTimerRef.current);\n        debounceTimerRef.current = null;\n      }\n    };\n  }, [compute, filterText, sortType]);\n\n  return result;\n}\n\nexport function filterSort(\n  proxies: IProxyItem[],\n  groupName: string,\n  filterText: string,\n  sortType: ProxySortType,\n  latencyTimeout?: number,\n  searchState?: ProxySearchState,\n) {\n  \n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst proxyOptions = () =\u003e {\n\n    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {\n      const options = proxies.global.all\n        .filter((p: any) =\u003e {\n          const name = typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name;\n          return name !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026 name !== \"REJECT\";\n        })\n        .map((p: any) =\u003e ({\n          name: typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name,\n        }));\n\n      return sortWithLatency(options);\n    }\n\n    // 规则模式\n    const group = state.selection.group\n      ? state.proxyData.groups.find((g) =\u003e g.name === state.selection.group)\n      : null;\n\n    if (group) {\n      const options = group.all.map((name) =\u003e ({ name }));\n      return sortWithLatency(options);\n    }\n\n    return [];\n  }, [\n    isDirectMode,\n    isGlobalMode,\n    proxies,\n    state.proxyData,\n    state.selection.group,\n    sortType,\n    delaySortRefresh,\n  ]);\n\n  // 获取排序图标\n  const getSortIcon = (): React.ReactElement =\u003e {\n    switch (sortType) {\n      case 1:\n        return \u003cAccessTimeRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e;\n      case 2:\n        return \u003cSortByAlphaRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e;\n      default:\n        return \u003cSortRounded fontSize=\"small\" /\u003e;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // 获取排序提示文本\n  const getSortTooltip = (): string =\u003e {\n    switch (sortType) {\n      case 0:\n        return t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortDefault\");\n      case 1:\n        return t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortDelay\");\n      case 2:\n        return t(\"proxies.page.tooltips.sortName\");\n      default:\n        return \"\";\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    \u003cEnhancedCard\n      title={t(\"home.components.currentProxy.title\")}\n;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "export const CurrentProxyCard = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 765,
            "text": "const proxyOptions = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 819
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 820,
            "text": "    if (isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 proxies?.global) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 821,
            "text": "      const options = proxies.global.all"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 822,
            "text": "        .filter((p: any) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 823,
            "text": "          const name = typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 824,
            "text": "          return name !== \"DIRECT\" \u0026\u0026 name !== \"REJECT\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 825,
            "text": "        })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 826,
            "text": "        .map((p: any) =\u003e ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 827,
            "text": "          name: typeof p === \"string\" ? p : p.name,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 828,
            "text": "        }));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 829
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 830,
            "text": "      return sortWithLatency(options);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 831,
            "text": "    }"

            "lineNumber": 832
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 833,
            "text": "    // 规则模式"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 834,
            "text": "    const group = state.selection.group"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 835,
            "text": "      ? state.proxyData.groups.find((g) =\u003e g.name === state.selection.group)"

            "lineNumber": 836,
            "text": "      : null;"

          {
            "lineNumber": 837
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 838,
            "text": "    if (group) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 839,
            "text": "      const options = group.all.map((name) =\u003e ({ name }));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 840,
            "text": "      return sortWithLatency(options);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 841,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 842
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 843,
            "text": "    return [];"

            "lineNumber": 844,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 854,
            "text": "  // 获取排序图标"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 855,
            "text": "  const getSortIcon = (): React.ReactElement =\u003e {"

          {

            "text": "    switch (sortType) {"

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_


安卓端连接界面的排序按钮逻辑如下：

---

## 排序按钮逻辑说明

### 1. 按钮位置与绑定

- **布局**：在 `design\src\main\res\layout\design_connections.xml` 里，`sort_order_view` 是一个 `ImageView`，图标为 `ic_baseline_swap_vert`（上下箭头）。
- **文案**：`connections_sort_order` 在中文里是「按时间排序」。
- **点击**：在 `ConnectionsDesign.kt` 的 `init` 里绑定到 `toggleSortOrder()`：

```87:87:design\src\main\java\com\github\kr328\clash\design\ConnectionsDesign.kt
        binding.sortOrderView.setOnClickListener { toggleSortOrder() }
```

---

### 2. 排序状态

- 用一个布尔变量控制顺序：
  - `sortNewestFirst = true`：**新连接在前**（按开始时间从新到旧）
  - `sortNewestFirst = false`：**旧连接在前**（按开始时间从旧到新）

```44:46:design\src\main\java\com\github\kr328\clash\design\ConnectionsDesign.kt
    /** When true, newest connections first (descending by start time). */
    private var sortNewestFirst = true
    private var lastSnapshot: ConnectionsSnapshot? = null
```

默认是「新连接在前」。

---

### 3. 点击时做的事（`toggleSortOrder`）

```89:92:design\src\main\java\com\github\kr328\clash\design\ConnectionsDesign.kt
    private fun toggleSortOrder() {
        sortNewestFirst = !sortNewestFirst
        lastSnapshot?.let { snapshot -> launch { patchConnections(snapshot) } }
    }
```

- 每次点击：把 `sortNewestFirst` 取反（新↔旧切换）。
- 若有上次缓存的连接快照 `lastSnapshot`，就用当前 `sortNewestFirst` 重新跑一遍 `patchConnections(snapshot)`，列表会按新的顺序刷新。

---

### 4. 实际排序实现（在 `patchConnections` 里）

```56:59:design\src\main\java\com\github\kr328\clash\design\ConnectionsDesign.kt
        val sorted = snapshot.connections.sortedBy { it.start }.let { list ->
            if (sortNewestFirst) list.asReversed() else list
        }
```

- 先按连接的 `start`（开始时间）**升序**排：`sortedBy { it.start }` → 时间早的在前。
- 再根据 `sortNewestFirst`：
  - `true`：`.asReversed()` → 变成时间晚的在前，即**最新连接在最上面**。
  - `false`：不反转 → **最早连接在最上面**。

也就是说，**只按「连接开始时间」这一种维度排序**，通过按钮在「新在前」和「旧在前」两种顺序之间切换。

---

### 5. 小结

| 项目 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| 排序依据 | 连接的开始时间 `start` |
| 两种顺序 | 新在前（默认）/ 旧在前 |
| 交互 | 点击一次切换一次顺序，并用当前快照重新 `patchConnections` 刷新列表 |

因此，这个排序按钮的作用就是：**在「按时间排序」的前提下，在「最新在前」和「最早在前」之间来回切换**，没有其他排序方式（例如按流量、按速度等）。

---

_**User**_

切换顺序之后，会跳转到底部对吗？

---

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

So `patchDataSet` uses a diff algorithm (`diffWith`) and then `dispatchUpdatesTo`. When we toggle sort order:
- Old list: [newest, ..., oldest] (newest first)
- New list: [oldest, ..., newest] (oldest first)

The diff will detect that every item has "moved" (because the order is completely reversed). So it will dispatch move operations. The key question is: does RecyclerView's DiffUtil / ListAdapter preserve scroll position by item identity, or by index?

When you use `notifyItemMoved` or the result of DiffUtil, RecyclerView typically tries to keep the same **items** visible - i.e. it tracks which items were visible and tries to keep them in view. So if you were looking at the top of the list (position 0), after a full reverse:
- Old position 0 had "newest connection"
- New list: "newest connection" is now at the last position

So RecyclerView would try to keep "newest connection" visible - which means it would scroll to show the last position, i.e. scroll to the bottom!

So yes, when switching from "newest first" to "oldest first", the list content is reversed. The item that was at the top (newest) is now at the bottom. If RecyclerView preserves visibility of the same items (by identity), then it would scroll to keep that item in view - i.e. scroll to the bottom.

I will check the diffWith implementation to see how it computes moves.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

So when we toggle sort order:
- Old list: [conn1(newest), conn2, conn3, ..., connN(oldest)]  (newest first)
- New list: [connN(oldest), ..., conn3, conn2, conn1(newest)]  (oldest first)

DiffUtil with detectMove=true will:
1. Match items by id (connection.id)
2. Detect that conn1 moved from position 0 to position N-1, connN moved from N-1 to 0, etc.
3. Dispatch move operations

When RecyclerView receives these move/change notifications, it tries to keep the **currently visible items** still visible. So whatever item(s) were at the top of the visible area (e.g. conn1, conn2) will be scrolled to stay in view. Since conn1 (newest) moved from position 0 to position last, RecyclerView will scroll so that conn1 is still visible - which means scrolling to the bottom of the list!

So yes, the user's observation is correct: after switching from "newest first" to "oldest first", the list will effectively "jump" to show the bottom (because the items that were at the top have moved to the bottom, and RecyclerView keeps those items in view).

Conversely, if you were in "oldest first" and switched to "newest first", the items that were at the top (oldest) would move to the bottom, so the list would scroll to keep them in view - i.e. jump to the bottom again from the user's perspective... wait, no. If we're in "oldest first", the top shows oldest. When we switch to "newest first", the oldest items move to the bottom. So the items that were at the top (oldest) are now at the bottom. RecyclerView would scroll to keep them in view, so it would scroll to the bottom. So in both cases when you toggle, you might end up seeing the list jump to show the "other end" - because the items that were visible (at one end) are now at the opposite end.

So the answer is: Yes. When you switch the order, DiffUtil detects moves and RecyclerView tries to keep the same items (by id) in view. The items that were at the top (newest) are now at the bottom after switching to "oldest first", so the list will scroll to the bottom to keep them visible. So the user will feel like the list "jumped to the bottom".
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_


是的，你的理解对。

---

## 为什么会“跳到底部”

1. **数据是怎么变的**  
   - 排序前（新在前）：列表是 `[最新连接, …, 最旧连接]`，顶部是第 0 项。  
   - 点一次排序后（旧在前）：同一批连接变成 `[最旧连接, …, 最新连接]`，顺序整体反了。

2. **更新方式**  
   连接列表用的是 `patchDataSet(..., detectMove = true, id = { it.connection.id })`，也就是用 **DiffUtil + 按 id 检测移动**。  
   顺序反转后，每条连接都相当于从“旧列表的某个位置”移动到了“新列表的另一个位置”，所以会发出一堆 **move** 操作，而不是简单的整表刷新。

3. **RecyclerView 的行为**  
   在收到这些 move 后，RecyclerView 会尽量 **保持“当前可见的那几条连接”仍然可见**（按 id 跟踪）。  
   切换前你看到的是 **顶部的几条（最新连接）**，切换后这些“最新连接”在新列表里都跑到 **最后面** 去了，所以为了继续让它们留在视口里，列表就会 **滚到底部**。

所以：**切换顺序之后，列表会滚到底部**，是因为“原来在顶部的那几条”在新顺序里跑到了底部，RecyclerView 为了保持这些项可见就滚到底部了。  
如果你希望切换后固定停留在顶部（或某一端），就需要在切换排序后主动设置滚动位置（例如 `scrollToPosition(0)`），而不是依赖 DiffUtil 的“保持当前可见项”行为。

---

_**Agent (claude-4.5-opus-high-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
用户说再次切换排序后，列表不会回到顶部，而是停在中间位置。这个行为确实是 DiffUtil 的特性导致的。

让我解释一下：

1. 第一次切换（新在前 → 旧在前）：
   - 用户原本在顶部看最新的几条连接
   - 切换后，这些最新连接跑到底部
   - RecyclerView 保持这些项可见 → 滚到底部

2. 第二次切换（旧在前 → 新在前）：
   - 用户现在在底部看最新的几条连接
   - 切换后，这些最新连接又跑回顶部
   - 但问题是：用户切换前看的是"底部附近的几条"，切换后这些项可能分布在列表中间某处
   - RecyclerView 尝试保持这些项可见 → 停在中间

更准确地说：
- 如果用户在切换前在底部，看到的是列表的最后几项（比如 item 90-100）
- 切换后，这些 item 的位置会变化，但它们的 id 不变
- DiffUtil 会追踪这些 id，让它们保持可见
- 由于顺序反转，原来在最后的那些 id 会跑到中间或其他位置

实际上，这取决于用户在切换时看到的是哪些连接。由于每次切换都是把整个列表反转：
- 列表长度 N


- 原来在位置 i 的项，切换后会在位置 N-1-i
- 如果用户原来看的是位置 90-100（假设总共100项），切换后这些项会在位置 0-9
- 如果用户原来看的是位置 0-9，切换后这些项会在位置 90-100

所以：
- 第一次切换：从顶部(0-9) → 底部(90-100)
- 第二次切换：从底部(90-100) → 顶部(0-9)

但实际上用户看到的是停在中间，这说明用户在第二次切换时看的不是列表的最后几项，而是中间某处的项。DiffUtil 追踪这些项的 id，切换后它们的新位置可能就在中间，所以列表停在那里。

另外，如果连接列表在不断更新，位置计算也会有偏差。

关键是 DiffUtil + detectMove 会根据当前可见项在新列表中的实际位置来定位，而不是简单地回到顶部或底部。如果想要固定的行为，比如每次切换都回到顶部，需要在更新列表后手动调用 scrollToPosition。</details></think>

---

## 为什么第二次切换停在中间

关键在于：**RecyclerView 会尝试让「切换前你正在看的那几条连接」在切换后仍然可见**。

假设列表共有 100 条连接：

| 切换次数 | 切换前你在看 | 这些项在新列表的位置 | 切换后滚动到 |
|---------|-------------|---------------------|-------------|
| 第 1 次 | 顶部（第 0-9 条，即最新连接） | 底部（第 90-99 条） | **底部** |
| 第 2 次 | 底部附近（比如第 80-90 条） | 中间某处（第 10-20 条附近） | **中间** |

第二次切换时，你看的不一定是"最后一条"，可能已经往上滚了一点、或者有新连接进来打乱了位置。所以切换后那些 id 不一定正好落在顶部或底部，而是落在中间某处。

---

## 简单验证

如果你在 **完全底部**（看到最后一条连接）时切换，理论上会滚回 **顶部**。  
但只要视口里混入了"不是最后几条"的连接，最终位置就会偏离。

---

## 如果想要"切换后总是回到顶部"

需要在 `toggleSortOrder()` 里，刷新完列表后主动滚到顶部：

```kotlin
private fun toggleSortOrder() {
    sortNewestFirst = !sortNewestFirst
    lastSnapshot?.let { snapshot ->
        launch {
            patchConnections(snapshot)
            // 切换排序后强制滚到顶部
            withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
                binding.recyclerList.scrollToPosition(0)
            }
        }
    }
}
```

这样无论之前滚到哪里，切换后都会固定回到顶部。需要我帮你改吗？
